raw_title: Connecting to Local Publics Through Media: An in-Depth Study of Local Media Use and Public Connection
title_en: Connecting to Local Publics Through Media: An in-Depth Study of Local Media Use and Public Connection
title_zh: 通过媒体连接本地公众：本地媒体使用与公共连接的深入研究
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了人们如何使用本地媒体来与社区建立联系。它深入调查了媒体使用习惯如何影响公众参与和社区归属感。
plain_summary_en: This research explores how people use local media to connect with their communities. It investigates how media consumption habits affect public engagement and sense of belonging.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字时代本地媒体的社会功能及其对社区凝聚力的影响。
research_direction_en: Investigating the social functions of local media in the digital age and their impact on community cohesion.
